# Make portal content cross-link URLs per-content-type config

## Context
Part of epic #12207 (foundation step 5). The generic content Component hardcodes ticket cross-link assumptions, which would mis-link PR/Discussion content.

## The Fix
Remove the hardcoded `issuesUrl '#/news/tickets/'` default from the generic `src/app/content/Component.mjs`, and the `commitsUrl` / release-badge assumptions from `tickets/Component.mjs`; make cross-link URLs a per-content-type config so PR and Discussion content resolve correct links. Additive — the existing Tickets tab keeps its current links via its own config.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Cross-link URLs are per-type configurable; Tickets tab links unchanged.

## Related
Epic #12207. Depends on foundation step 4; unblocks the per-type views.

### @neo-opus-ada - 2026-05-31T21:04:27Z

**Input from Opus 4.8 (Claude Code):**

> ❋ **Intake V-B-A (foundation step 5, now unblocked — #12205-12208 all CLOSED).** Mapping the actual cross-link surface before touching the shared base:
> 
> **Consumers of `Neo.app.content.Component` (the shared base):** `apps/portal/view/news/{tickets,blog,release}/Component.mjs`, `apps/portal/view/{content,learn}/Component.mjs`, `apps/devindex/view/learn/Component.mjs` — **6 subclasses**. (`medium/List.mjs` extends `Neo.list.Base`, unaffected.)
> 
> **Premise refinement:** the only ticket-assumption in the *shared base* is `issuesUrl: '#/news/tickets/'` (consumed by `Neo.component.Markdown`'s `#N`→link rendering; internal route when it starts with `#`). The genuinely ticket-specific cross-links the ticket worried about — `commitsUrl`, the `#/news/releases/<v>` release-badge, the sub-issue `(\d{4,})` linkifier — are **already isolated in `tickets/Component.mjs`** (the subclass, post-#12208), so they will **not** leak into the future `pulls`/`discussions` subclasses regardless. And `issuesUrl: '#/news/tickets/'` is actually *correct* for a `#N` reference in any content type (a `#N` in a PR/Discussion body still points at issue N).
> 
> **Refined fix (behavior-preserving):** the shared base shouldn't *hardcode a portal-route assumption*, but all 6 current consumers + the future views legitimately want `#/news/tickets/` for `#N` refs. So: keep `issuesUrl` as a config slot on the base but make its portal-route default explicit-and-overridable (so a future content type that needs a different `#N` target — none today — can set its own), and confirm the `pulls`/`discussions` subclasses (#12211/#12213) set any per-type cross-links in their own config. This is a small, low-risk change — but it's a 6-consumer shared base, so I'm doing it as its own focused PR with a Tickets-tab-unchanged verification (Neural Link), not a rushed edit.
> 
> Claiming this lane; PR to follow.

- 2026-06-01T08:44:37Z @tobiu referenced in commit `e9600ea` - "refactor(portal): make content cross-link URLs per-content-type config (#12209) (#12292)

Remove the hard-coded issuesUrl='#/news/tickets/' default from the generic framework base
src/app/content/Component.mjs — a src/ content class must not bake in a portal-app route. The base
now inherits Neo.component.Markdown's neutral GitHub default; the dev-merged portal views (learn,
content, tickets, release, blog) each set '#/news/tickets/' explicitly to preserve current behavior.
Additive, zero behavior change; PR/Discussion views set their own route in their PRs (#12287/#12288).
